commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2ed18afc3c1fd8c7112eb6588116513910606e21)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `useTempDirTracker()`, migrates temp-dir helper importers and testing docs to the auto-cleaning pattern, updates helper test-routing expectations, and touches one gateway-protocol guard test.

PR surface: Tests -83, Docs -4. Total -87 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-helper cleanup rather than a reported runtime bug. The reviewable proof is source inspection plus the PR's targeted Vitest, `tsgo`, formatting, and temp-dir report evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The branch is maintainer-labeled and currently conflicting, so the next action is author or maintainer rebase/review rather than a ClawSweeper cleanup close or repair job.

target.title: test: use auto-cleaning temp dir helper
target.body:
## Summary
- add `useTempDirTracker()` to `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts`, with Vitest-owned automatic cleanup after each test
- remove the shared helper's manual cleanup API so callers cannot keep using `cleanup()` / `cleanupTempDirs()` / `makeTempDir(...)`
- migrate the existing `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` importers on `main` to the auto-cleaning tracker, including script, launcher, config, docs-audit, and model-config tests
- update the testing guide to document the no-manual-cleanup shape and keep `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` changes routed to its importer tests
- keep the positive CI validation shape: helper-backed temp dirs produce zero temp-dir warning findings
- fix an unrelated `check-test-types` noise source by narrowing TypeBox union schema access in `native-protocol-levels.guard.test.ts`

## Verification
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts src/agents/models-config.file-mode.test.ts src/install-sh-version.test.ts src/entry.compile-cache.test.ts src/scripts/docs-link-audit.test.ts src/scripts/sync-plugin-versions.test.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/ios-pin-version.test.ts test/scripts/ios-team-id.test.ts test/scripts/ios-version.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts test/scripts/report-test-temp-creations.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts test/test-env.test.ts test/vitest-scoped-config.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/native-protocol-levels.guard.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:test`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD --json` -> `[]`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check docs/help/testing.md src/agents/models-config.file-mode.test.ts src/entry.compile-cache.test.ts src/install-sh-version.test.ts src/scripts/docs-link-audit.test.ts src/scripts/sync-plugin-versions.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/ios-pin-version.test.ts test/scripts/ios-team-id.test.ts test/scripts/ios-version.test-support.ts test/scripts/ios-version.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts test/scripts/report-test-temp-creations.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts test/test-env.test.ts test/vitest-scoped-config.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
